title: BREU British Diesels And Electrics For Immersive Railroading
description: a collection of transport fever 2 ports of british trains to immersive railroading
body:
British Rail Engineering Unlimited

BIG OVERHAUL 4.0

Includes:

Class 87 of a much higher quality than previous stock in this pack

Mk3 TF, TS and TRFB also of much higher quality than previously

Ensure you have the Immersive Railroading mod installed.  
Download the pack from Modrinth.  
Place the downloaded file into your Minecraft config/immersive railroading folder.  
Start building your railway empire with stunning new trains!  

List Of HUGE Thanks To The Modders Who Allowed Me To Port Their Models:

Tankslapper
